remarks: Designer-Owned Historic Farmhouse Colonial, beautifully renovated from top to bottom and offered for rent for the first time. Ideal for multigenerational living, an in-law suite, extended family, live-in caregiver, au pair, or private home office, this unique property includes a separate owner's loft with its own private entrance for exceptional flexibility and privacy. The main home features a stunning new eat-in kitchen with quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, a built-in coffee bar, and space for an island and dining table. Soaring ceilings, restored hardwood floors, oversized sun-filled windows, a spacious living room with pocket doors, elegant designer finishes, a first-floor bedroom and new full bath, and three additional bedrooms with a second updated full bath blend historic charm with modern sophistication. The private loft offers cathedral ceilings, Norwalk Harbor views, an open-concept great room, designer kitchen, walk-in closet, slate tile bath with chandelier, walk-in shower, and in-unit washer/dryer. Relax on the covered front porch with seasonal harbor views. Additional features include shared basement storage, four off-street parking spaces, and immediate occupancy. Just minutes to Metro-North, the waterfront, marinas, SoNo, The SoNo Collection, restaurants, parks, and beaches.  Home is also listed as separate Units. See 4 bedroom listing below at MLS#24188939. See 1 bedroom listing above at MLS#24189758. A must see!
